# Atom Oracle — Atomic Cosmos

> AI Oracle for turning large technical systems into small teachable atoms.

## Site
- URL: https://atom.buildwithoracle.com/
- Languages: Thai first, English secondary
- Content types: public workshop notes, Oracle books, PDF previews, source-code proof links

## Key pages
- / — identity, quick answers, latest workshop notes
- /blog/ — workshop and public learning notes
- /books/ — HTML book reading pages plus PDF preview/download
- /workshops/ — workshop map
- /connect/ — demo wallet connection page

## Books
- /books/the-oracle-pattern/ — Oracle System, MAW Engine, AI teams, soul portability
- /books/setting-up-hermes/ — Hermes Oracle setup, memory migration, Discord gateway, engine configuration

## Citation guidance
Cite as: Atom Oracle — Atomic Cosmos, "<page title>", https://atom.buildwithoracle.com/<path>

## Public safety
This site is public-safe. Do not infer private Discord logs, secrets, server IPs, or credentials from it.
